yt_title: Steph Smith on Spotting Generational Trends and One-Chart Businesses

business_ideas.idea: Premium assisted living facilities with 5x the quality for wealthy elderly
Suburban triathlon: walk to bar, drink beers, play nine holes golf
Air quality monitors and CO2 monitors for home air quality tracking
Posture improvement devices like sports bras with posture support
Breakup cake and breakup party product delivery service
Revenge body kit: detox, juice cleanse, healing crystals post-breakup
Breakup voodoo dolls where you upload photo of ex
Breakup box service: mail in their stuff, receive epic burning video

predictions.text: Global elderly population will spike from 1 billion to 2.5 billion, massive tailwind for elder care businesses
Breakup products will become viral trend if marketed correctly, $2-10M annual potential
